sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ عُمَرُ مَشْرُوعَهُ الْخَاصَّ فِي مَجَالِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا.
sentences.translation: Omar je započeo vlastiti projekat u oblasti tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: Omar started his own project in the field of technology.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَحْلُمُ دَائِمًا بِأَنْ يَكُونَ صَاحِبَ شَرِكَةٍ نَاجِحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je sanjao o tome da bude vlasnik uspješne kompanije.
sentences.translationEn: He always dreamed of being the owner of a successful company.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِتَطْوِيرِ فِكْرَتِهِ الْمُبْتَكَرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan naporno radi na razvoju svoje inovativne ideje.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard every day to develop his innovative idea.
